What to Know About the ‘Massive’ Military Bunker Under the Ballroom
By now, you’ve probably heard about President Trump’s ballroom. But quietly, below the planned ballroom, there is secret construction work underway.
The Trump administration is at work on what the president describes as “massive complex” beneath what was once the East Wing.
Trump is envisioning a renovation and expansion of the Presidential Emergency Operations Center, or PEOC, which was built during World War II to protect President Franklin D. Roosevelt.
Details about the project have been filed under seal in federal court, but some information has emerged, including that the underground complex would have a bomb shelter and a full hospital.
There are still many unanswered questions, including the costs of construction and annual maintenance.
